meaning: n.保险箱,饭橱,菜橱,冷藏室adj.免受攻击的,安全的,可靠的,有把握的
examples: The children are quite safe here.
I think you're pretty safe, considering.
The changes have worked well and have not compromised the safe operation of trains.
They are thought to be fairly safe, although some experts have raised concerns about side-effects.
